global_description: Circular device with rotating blades, typically metallic or plastic, mounted on a base or stand. It features a protective grille, often in a mesh pattern, and a control panel for speed adjustment. The blades are usually white or silver, and the body can vary in color.

part_details.blades: Rotating, usually white or silver, often three or more
part_details.control_panel: Buttons or dial for speed adjustment
part_details.body: Varies in color, supports the structure
